positive: A minimalist, stylish illustration of a soaring mountain goat silhouette set against a stylized abstract forest canopy. The composition should use limited, vibrant colors—deep teal, muted terracotta, and cream—with negative space being a key design element. The goat must be in a graceful, powerful pose, centered in the frame. Focus on clean lines, strong contrasts, and a retro-travel poster aesthetic. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, featuring sharp edges and clear demarcations between shapes. Vector art quality, flat design, maximalist simplicity, clean background, illustration.
negative: blur, grain, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, noisy, artifacts, sloppy lines, poor anatomy, extra limbs, photorealism, 3d render, messy, collage
